text:
K2- is the 1st track on disc 1 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 3 Original Soundtrack.

As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Title

The title refers to Kenny Ackermann, since the japanese word for 2 is pronounced "ni".

Musical motifs

This track has 2 remixes: K21 and K21 (Instrumental).
